hero.title: China Special Oil Supply Chain
hero.subtitle: Your Trusted Partner in China's Specialty Oil Supply Chain

story.title: Connecting China's Premium Special Oils to Global Markets
story.p1: Founded in 2025, we have quickly established ourselves as a dedicated supply chain platform with a clear mission: to provide the world with access to premium quality special oils from China's most reputable manufacturers.
story.p2: We specialize in sourcing and delivering high-quality Chinese special oils, connecting global industrial clients with premium manufacturers. Our core expertise lies in providing integrated supply chain solutions for procurement, quality control, and logistics.
story.p3: With a team of industry professionals who bring extensive experience in the oil and gas sector, we've built strong partnerships with manufacturers to ensure our customers receive exceptional products at competitive prices, every time.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To provide reliable, efficient, and transparent supply chain services that connect global buyers with China's specialty oil manufacturers.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To become the most trusted bridge between international markets and China's specialty oil industry.

quality.title: Quality First
quality.description: We ensure every product meets international standards

supplyChain.title: Our Complete Supply Chain Solution
supplyChain.intro: We offer a seamless supply chain solution that covers every step from sourcing to delivery, ensuring our customers receive high-quality Chinese special oils efficiently and reliably.
supplyChain.step1Desc: Direct access to premium special oil manufacturers in China, with rigorous supplier qualification processes.
supplyChain.step2Desc: Comprehensive testing and inspection at multiple stages to ensure products meet international standards.
supplyChain.step3Desc: Complete handling of export documentation, customs clearance, and compliance with international trade regulations.
supplyChain.step4Desc: Reliable shipping solutions to ports worldwide, with flexible options to meet your specific needs.

quality.title: Rigorous Quality Control
quality.intro: We understand that quality is paramount for industrial lubricants. Our comprehensive quality control system ensures that every product meets the highest international standards and your specific requirements.

lab.title: Laboratory Testing
lab.intro: Our products undergo rigorous testing in ISO-certified laboratories to ensure they meet all technical specifications.

inspection.title: Factory Inspection
inspection.intro: Regular factory audits and inspections ensure consistent manufacturing quality.

global.title: Our Global Presence
global.intro: We have successfully delivered Chinese special oils to industrial customers in more than 50 countries worldwide. Our experience in international trade ensures smooth transactions and on-time deliveries.

distribution.title: Regional Distribution
distribution.desc: Strategically located warehouses in key regions to ensure prompt delivery and local support.

support.title: Multilingual Support
support.desc: Our team speaks English and Chinese to better serve our global customers.

shipping.title: Flexible Shipping
shipping.desc: Various shipping options including FOB, CFR, CIF, and DDP to meet your specific requirements.

testimonials.title: Customer Testimonials
testimonials.quote1: The quality of Chinese special oils we received was exceptional, and the supply chain service made the entire process seamless.
testimonials.quote2: We've been importing transformer oil from China through this platform for 5 years now. Consistent quality and reliable deliveries every time.

transformer.title: Transformer Oil
transformer.description: Premium naphthenic transformer oils from China with excellent dielectric properties and low sulfur content, ideal for high-voltage applications.

rubber.title: Rubber Process Oil
rubber.description: High solvency naphthenic rubber process oils from China with low PAH content, perfect for tire manufacturing and rubber compounding.

lubricants.title: Hydraulic & Industrial Oils
lubricants.description: High-performance hydraulic oils and industrial lubricants from China, engineered for extreme conditions and heavy-duty applications.

compliance.desc: All our Chinese special oil products meet or exceed international standards, ensuring quality and reliability for your industrial applications.

process.title: Our Quality Process
process.intro: At CN-SpecLube Chain, we maintain rigorous quality control throughout our entire supply chain, from raw material sourcing to finished product delivery. Our commitment to quality ensures that every product meets the highest industry standards.

step1.title: Strategic Sourcing
step1.desc: We partner with leading Chinese specialty oil manufacturers, carefully selecting suppliers known for their exceptional quality standards and consistent product excellence.

step2.title: Hydro-treating
step2.desc: Our advanced hydro-treating process removes impurities and stabilizes the base oil, ensuring superior performance characteristics and extended service life.

step3.title: CNAS Lab Test
step3.desc: All our products undergo rigorous testing in our CNAS-accredited laboratory, ensuring compliance with international standards and specifications.

step4.title: Shipment
step4.desc: We ensure proper packaging and handling during shipment to maintain product integrity, with complete documentation for customs clearance and quality assurance.

qms.title: Quality Management System
qms.intro: Our ISO 9001-certified Quality Management System ensures consistent product quality and continuous improvement throughout our operations.

certificates.title: Our Certifications
certificates.intro: We maintain various international certifications to ensure our products and processes meet the highest standards.

standards.title: International Standards
standards.intro: All our products comply with international quality standards and specifications.
standards.astm: American Society for Testing and Materials standards for petroleum products
standards.iso: International Organization for Standardization specifications for lubricants
standards.din: Deutsches Institut für Normung specifications for industrial applications
standards.gb: Chinese national standards for petroleum and chemical products
standards.api: American Petroleum Institute performance standards for engine oils
standards.reach: Registration, Evaluation, Authorization and Restriction of Chemicals

testing.title: Testing Methods
testing.intro: Comprehensive testing ensures product quality and performance.

viscosity.name: Viscosity Measurement
viscosity.desc: Testing of oil viscosity at various temperatures to ensure proper lubrication properties

flashPoint.name: Flash Point Testing
flashPoint.desc: Determination of the lowest temperature at which the oil vapors ignite

pourPoint.name: Pour Point Testing
pourPoint.desc: Measurement of the lowest temperature at which the oil remains fluid

acidNumber.name: Acid Number Determination
acidNumber.desc: Testing of acidic properties to evaluate oxidation and degradation levels

elemental.name: Elemental Analysis
elemental.desc: Measurement of additive elements concentration using advanced spectroscopy techniques

particle.name: Particle Counting
particle.desc: Evaluation of the cleanliness level of lubricants using laser particle counters

cta.title: Need Quality Assurance Documentation?
cta.desc: Contact us to request certificates of analysis, test reports, or quality documentation.

bulk.title: Bulk Liquid Transportation
bulk.description: We offer efficient and cost-effective bulk liquid transportation solutions for our raw materials, designed to meet the specific requirements of the oil and lubricants industry.

isoTank.title: ISO Tank
isoTank.description: Stainless steel tanks designed for safe and efficient transportation of bulk liquids. Loading capacity varies by product density—typically 21,000-26,000L depending on the specific gravity of the liquid being transported.

flexibag.title: Flexibag
flexibag.description: Flexible intermediate bulk containers with heating pad available for temperature-sensitive products.

cost.title: Cost Efficient
cost.description: Reduced packaging costs and lower handling expenses

environment.title: Environmentally Friendly
environment.description: Minimized packaging waste and reduced carbon footprint

handling.title: Efficient Handling
handling.description: Simplified logistics and faster loading/unloading processes

packaged.title: Packaged Goods Transportation
packaged.description: Our finished lubricants are available in various packaging options, each designed to ensure product integrity during transportation and storage.

drums.title: Drums
drums.description: 200L steel drums securely packed on wooden pallets for stability during transport.

ibc.title: IBC
ibc.description: 1000L intermediate bulk containers designed for efficient storage and handling with forklifts or pallet jacks.

smallPacks.title: Small Packs
smallPacks.description: 18L plastic buckets and smaller containers packed in sturdy cartons for safe transportation.

shipping.title: Global Shipping Routes
shipping.description: We have established reliable shipping routes to ensure timely delivery of our products to customers worldwide. Our global logistics network covers all major regions.

asiaNorthAmerica.ports: Qingdao, Tianjin → Los Angeles, New York

ocean.title: Ocean Freight
ocean.description: Most economical option for large volumes, available in FCL (Full Container Load) and LCL (Less than Container Load)

air.title: Air Freight
air.description: Expedited shipping for urgent orders, ideal for small volumes and time-sensitive deliveries

land.title: Land Transportation
land.description: Trucking services for inland deliveries and cross-border transportation in neighboring countries

customs.title: Customs & Compliance
customs.description: We have extensive experience in international trade regulations and customs procedures, ensuring smooth and compliant shipments to destinations worldwide.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What documentation do I need to provide for international shipping?
faq.a1: For most international shipments, we require your company details, port of destination, and preferred Incoterms. We will handle the preparation of all necessary shipping documents based on your specific requirements.
faq.q2: How do you ensure compliance with international regulations?
faq.a2: Our logistics team stays updated on the latest international trade regulations and maintains close relationships with regulatory authorities. We conduct regular training and audits to ensure full compliance with all applicable laws and standards.
faq.q3: Can you assist with customs clearance at the destination port?
faq.a3: Yes, we have a global network of customs brokers and agents who can assist with customs clearance at virtually any destination port worldwide. We can provide DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) services for a complete door-to-door solution.

globalNetwork.title: Global Network
globalNetwork.description: Comprehensive logistics network covering all major regions worldwide

productSafety.title: Product Safety
productSafety.description: Stringent safety protocols to ensure product integrity during transportation

onTimeDelivery.title: On-Time Delivery
onTimeDelivery.description: Reliable transportation solutions with commitment to delivery schedules

dedicatedSupport.title: Dedicated Support
dedicatedSupport.description: Expert logistics team providing personalized support throughout the shipping process
